metadata.description: Markus Johansen's Claude Code plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: scaffold
plugins.description: Scaffolds and maintains a personal Claude Code config space (skills, subagents, hooks, rules, global CLAUDE.md, bootstrap symlinker).

plugins.name: devkit
plugins.description: Coding toolkit — planning, commit/PR/review/quality skills, code-focused subagents, and auto-format / secret / dangerous-rm safety hooks.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian vault toolkit — note skills, the vault-librarian subagent, a path-scoped vault rule, and edit-guard / frontmatter / stub hooks.

plugins.name: notify
plugins.description: Desktop attention cues — a Stop chime that fires when you've walked away, its idle-tracker, and a macOS notification banner.

plugins.name: opsx-orchestrate
plugins.description: Orchestration over the opsx (OpenSpec) plugin — partition change items into non-overlapping scopes, then fan them out across isolated worktrees as one branch + PR each.

plugins.name: supacode
plugins.description: Work with the Supacode agent terminal — add, use, and clean up worktrees through the supacode CLI.
